> This template backs the commercial-licensing contact channel described
> in [`NOTICE`](../../NOTICE). The author is generally happy to grant
> commercial use; the goal of this issue is simply to be informed and to
> agree on terms (which may be "free, with credit").

**Who you are**

**How you intend to use the project**
<!-- Distribution model, product/service it would be part of, scale. -->

**Which version / commit**

**Anything you'd like to ask or propose?**

---

If you'd rather not discuss this in public, mention that here and the
maintainer will reach out via your GitHub profile to move the
conversation off-issue.
